name: Pumpkin Patch Pie
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Cool Whip non-dairy whipped topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the orange sherbet in a bowl and stir until smooth.
2. Stir in half of the cooled whip into the sherbet until well blended.
3. Spoon the mixture into a 9-inch Oreo pie crust.
4. Sprinkle chopped Oreos over the top, pressing firmly.
5. Top with the remaining cool whip.
6. Freeze for 4 hours or until firm.
7. Let stand at room temperature for 10 minutes before serving.
8. Garnish with finely chopped Oreos and candy pumpkins, if desired.
Note: For a more intense orange color, stir in a few drops of red and yellow food coloring.
